ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Associated Alcohols & Breweries Limited (AABL) has launched "Kultur," a hard seltzer, in Madhya Pradesh, strategically entering India's fast-growing ready-to-drink (RTD) beverage segment. This initiative aligns with AABL's premiumization strategy, targeting Gen Z and millennial consumers to capitalize on projected market growth of over 10-18% CAGR, offering significant potential for revenue diversification. While promising, the successful realization of this growth hinges on effective market penetration and consumer adoption in a competitive landscape, with the usual inherent risks associated with new product launches.
